description_long: This is a rectangular wooden filing cabinet drawer with a simple, utilitarian design. The front face is finished in a darker wood tone and features a single metallic bar handle, which is slightly raised from the surface. The sides and back are made from lighter-colored plywood, with visible wood grain and some minor scuff marks. The interior is hollow, designed to store files or documents, and the construction appears sturdy with clean, straight edges. There are no visible label holders or lock mechanisms on the front. The overall appearance suggests it is a single drawer unit, likely intended to be inserted into a larger cabinet frame.
description: A single wooden filing cabinet drawer with a metallic bar handle and a dark wood front, designed for document storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark wood face and metallic bar handle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the lighter plywood side panel and the absence of handles or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, light wood back panel with no handle or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with visible wood grain and no additional features.
